description: Master index for all space/aerospace books in Project Rocket Science. Used for systematic ingestion of the 9+ PDFs in SPACE BOOKS collection.

books.title: Fundamentals of Astrodynamics
books.author: Bate, Mueller, White
books.pdf: Bate, Mueller, and White - Fundamentals of Astrodynamics.pdf

steps: 1. Place PDF in known location (e.g. ~/SPACE BOOKS or Downloads)
2. Run or manually create data/books/<slug>/book.json with metadata from books.json
3. Extract key chapters/sections relevant to rocket science (use LLM or manual)
4. Create 1-3 lessons per major topic in data/lessons/ or data/books/<slug>/lessons/
5. For each lesson, write content following Lesson template in types.ts
6. Generate image prompts and video storyboards (see list at end of Phase 4)
7. Link lesson to existing or new simulators via simulatorSlug
8. Update curriculum.ts levels to include new lesson ids
9. Add visuals to public/ or use generated URLs
ingestProcess.notes: Start with core propulsion and aero books (Sutton, Anderson). Then add astrodynamics (Bate/Curtis), vehicle dynamics, SMAD, NASA handbook. Lessons should cross-reference books where concepts overlap (e.g. propulsion + aero for ascent).
